title: Corvis pvp modpack
description: A pvp modpack for smps, and pvp in general
body: This is a modpack of all the best mods for smp's and pvp, make sure to check your smp's rules before using some of the mods in the modpack, I am NOT liable for you being banned for using this modpack. This modpack does NOT contain any cheats/hacks, for logical reasons. This pack comes with performance enhancing mods and pvp focused mods, it comes with some of the biggest mods, such as sodium for better performance, and Simple Voice Chat, for more fun with friends!
